Examples.Title:
Cancel an active ChatKit session and return its most recent metadata.

Cancelling prevents new requests from using the issued client secret.
Examples.Code:
### Cancel an active ChatKit session and return its most recent metadata.

Cancelling prevents new requests from using the issued client secret.
# @name CancelChatSessionMethod
POST {{host}}/chatkit/sessions/{{session_id}}/cancel
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Success
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title:
Compact a conversation. Returns a compacted response object.

Learn when and how to compact long-running conversations in the [conversation state guide](/docs/guides/conversation-state#managing-the-context-window). For ZDR-compatible compaction details, see [Compaction (advanced)](/docs/guides/conversation-state#compaction-advanced).
Examples.Code:
### Compact a conversation. Returns a compacted response object.

Learn when and how to compact long-running conversations in the [conversation state guide](/docs/guides/conversation-state#managing-the-context-window). For ZDR-compatible compaction details, see [Compaction (advanced)](/docs/guides/conversation-state#compaction-advanced).
# @name Compactconversation
POST {{host}}/responses/compact
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "model": "gpt-5.1",
  "input": "string",
  "previous_response_id": "resp_123",
  "instructions": "string",
  "prompt_cache_key": "string",
  "prompt_cache_retention": "in_memory"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Success
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Create a ChatKit session.

Returns input token counts of the request.

Returns an object with `object` set to `response.input_tokens` and an `input_tokens` count.
Examples.Code:
### Returns input token counts of the request.

Returns an object with `object` set to `response.input_tokens` and an `input_tokens` count.
# @name Getinputtokencounts
POST {{host}}/responses/input_tokens
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "model": "string",
  "input": "string",
  "previous_response_id": "resp_123",
  "tools": [
    {
      "type": "function",
      "name": "string",
      "description": "string",
      "parameters": {},
      "strict": true,
      "defer_loading": true
    }
  ],
  "text": {
    "format": {
      "type": "text"
    },
    "verbosity": "medium"
  },
  "reasoning": {
    "effort": "medium",
    "summary": "auto",
    "generate_summary": "auto"
  },
  "truncation": "auto",
  "instructions": "string",
  "conversation": "openapi-json-null-sentinel-value-2BF93600-0FE4-4250-987A-E5DDB203E464",
  "tool_choice": "none",
  "parallel_tool_calls": true
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Success
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Retrieve a ChatKit thread by its identifier.
Examples.Code:
### Retrieve a ChatKit thread by its identifier.
# @name GetThreadMethod
GET {{host}}/chatkit/threads/{{thread_id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Success
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Creates an edited or extended image given one or more source images and a prompt. This endpoint supports GPT Image models (`gpt-image-1.5`, `gpt-image-1`, `gpt-image-1-mini`, and `chatgpt-image-latest`) and `dall-e-2`.
Examples.Description:
You can call this endpoint with either:

- `multipart/form-data`: use binary uploads via `image` (and optional `mask`).
- `application/json`: use `images` (and optional `mask`) as references with either `image_url` or `file_id`.

Note that JSON requests use `images` (array) instead of the multipart `image` field.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using tryAGI.OpenAI;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title:
Cancels a model response with the given ID. Only responses created with
the `background` parameter set to `true` can be cancelled. 
[Learn more](/docs/guides/background).
Examples.Code:
### Cancels a model response with the given ID. Only responses created with
the `background` parameter set to `true` can be cancelled. 
[Learn more](/docs/guides/background).

# @name cancelResponse
POST {{host}}/responses/{{response_id}}/cancel
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: OK
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Not Found
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title:
Creates a model response. Provide [text](/docs/guides/text) or
[image](/docs/guides/images) inputs to generate [text](/docs/guides/text)
or [JSON](/docs/guides/structured-outputs) outputs. Have the model call
your own [custom code](/docs/guides/function-calling) or use built-in
[tools](/docs/guides/tools) like [web search](/docs/guides/tools-web-search)
or [file search](/docs/guides/tools-file-search) to use your own data
as input for the model's response.
Examples.Code:
### Creates a model response. Provide [text](/docs/guides/text) or
[image](/docs/guides/images) inputs to generate [text](/docs/guides/text)
or [JSON](/docs/guides/structured-outputs) outputs. Have the model call
your own [custom code](/docs/guides/function-calling) or use built-in
[tools](/docs/guides/tools) like [web search](/docs/guides/tools-web-search)
or [file search](/docs/guides/tools-file-search) to use your own data
as input for the model's response.

# @name createResponse
POST {{host}}/responses
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json, text/event-stream

{
  "previous_response_id": "string",
  "model": "gpt-5.1",
  "reasoning": {
    "effort": "medium",
    "summary": "auto",
    "generate_summary": "auto"
  },
  "background": false,
  "max_tool_calls": 0,
  "text": {
    "format": {
      "type": "text"
    },
    "verbosity": "medium"
  },
  "tools": [
    {
      "type": "function",
      "name": "string",
      "description": "string",
      "parameters": {},
      "strict": true,
      "defer_loading": true
    }
  ],
  "tool_choice": "none",
  "prompt": {
    "id": "string",
    "version": "string",
    "variables": {}
  },
  "truncation": "disabled",
  "input": "string",
  "include": [
    "file_search_call.results"
  ],
  "parallel_tool_calls": true,
  "store": true,
  "instructions": "string",
  "stream": false,
  "stream_options": "openapi-json-null-sentinel-value-2BF93600-0FE4-4250-987A-E5DDB203E464",
  "conversation": "openapi-json-null-sentinel-value-2BF93600-0FE4-4250-987A-E5DDB203E464",
  "context_management": [
    {
      "type": "string",
      "compact_threshold": 0
    }
  ],
  "max_output_tokens": 0
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: OK
# Content-Type: application/json, text/event-stream

Examples.Title: Retrieves a model response with the given ID.
Examples.Code:
### Retrieves a model response with the given ID.

# @name getResponse
GET {{host}}/responses/{{response_id}}?include={{include}}&stream={{stream}}&starting_after={{starting_after}}&include_obfuscation={{include_obfuscation}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: OK
# Content-Type: application/json
